title: MANGA NGE How will it end Give ME Reis severed arm
display_title: MANGA NGE How will it end Give ME Reis severed arm
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] How will it end? Give ME Rei's severed arm!             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 28, 2005 10:38 pm Split from the "New Manga Stage" thread. I have a bad habit of leading the lambs astray, don't I? -Reichu I can smell it already. We're going to get the severed arm ending, aren't we?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Fri Apr 29, 2005 3:47 pm Reichu wrote: I can smell it already. We're going to get the severed arm ending, aren't we?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 29, 2005 4:44 pm Ryo wrote: In the name of Lilith, NO!

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Apr 29, 2005 4:57 pm I can smell it already. We're going to get the severed arm ending, aren't we? In the name of Lilith, NO!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 29, 2005 4:58 pm Reichu wrote: Ryo wrote: In the name of Lilith, NO!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:08 pm Reichu wrote: The way Sadamoto has been treating Asuka, "Kimochi warui" is definitely out. In fact, I can't forsee any Shinji/Asuka ending at all.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:10 pm Being the suka fanboy I am, I hope we get an Asuka ending. Doe we know how many stages their will be total? For the love of anno please do not have Asuka actuly kill herself that would break my heart :(

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:14 pm DatDude wrote: Being the suka fanboy I am, I hope we get an Asuka ending. Doe we know how many stages their will be total? For the love of anno please do not have Asuka actuly kill herself that would break my heart :(

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:18 pm DatDude wrote: For the love of anno please do not have Asuka actuly kill herself that would break my heart :(

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:23 pm The only thing that i don't like from the manga version,is that annoying Kaworu..If he keeps saying "how stupid was the First" i can see Shinji enjoying killing him.. I really wanna see how Sadamoto will turn out these things..

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:39 pm The only thing that i don't like from the manga version,is that annoying Kaworu..If he keeps saying "how stupid was the First" i can see Shinji enjoying killing him.. I really wanna see how Sadamoto will turn out these things..

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:42 pm Defectron wrote: The same logic behind him killing the kitten and making that remark about Rei is the very same logic he used in the anime when he decided it would be better for Shinji to kill him.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Apr 29, 2005 5:59 pm Dave wrote: Defectron wrote: The same logic behind him killing the kitten and making that remark about Rei is the very same logic he used in the anime when he decided it would be better for Shinji to kill him.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Apr 29, 2005 6:02 pm Defectron wrote: Actually I like the manga version of Kaworu, if you think about it there really is nothing that's really different from how his character was in the anime, he's just getting development in different ways. The comment about Rei and killing the kitten earlier may make him look like kind of a jerk from our point of veiw, but you have to keep in mind the sort of logic Kaworu uses in his outlook of the world is a bit different from those used by regular humans its very black and white. The same logic behind him killing the kitten and making that remark about Rei is the very same logic he used in the anime when he decided it would be better for Shinji to kill him.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 29, 2005 7:24 pm DatDude wrote: No anno's Kaworu let Shinji live the rest of us were just lucky he liked the kid. :P

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Apr 29, 2005 8:35 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I'm not even convinced that we'll get Shinji rejecting Instrumentality. What if we get something that goes like this... Rei (voice): What do you wish for? Shinji: I want to help you in some way... and to be with you forever.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Apr 29, 2005 10:34 pm I still think kowarus descision in the anime may have been based on the same weird logic I was talking about earlier. The way I see it Kaworu saw humanity having more potential as a species so he chose to die instead. This is supported by that whole "survival of the fittest" speech Misato gives Shinji at the end of that episode. But I guess this could be debated. One thing that bugs me about Kaworu killing the kitten -- what if Shinji had been planning to adopt it?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Apr 29, 2005 10:46 pm Reichu wrote: DatDude wrote: No anno's Kaworu let Shinji live the rest of us were just lucky he liked the kid. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Apr 29, 2005 11:14 pm He was speaking metaphorically. Humanity needs the future in the sense that we need something to look foward too, we need hope.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Fri Apr 29, 2005 11:54 pm poor, poor kitten... :cry:
